generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current I_M input and torque output"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for rotational energy transformation"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller accepting position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, GearboxOutputTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox position measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox angular velocity measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance GearboxOutputTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox output torque measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxOutputTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation data from Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData, GearboxAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkStribeckSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation data from Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData, GearboxAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkDahlSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation data from Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData, GearboxAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkLuGreSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation data from LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData, GearboxAngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for systems engineering modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DynamicFrictionModelExchangeService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, DataTraceabilityService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for integrated data display"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for integrated data display"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of white-box and black-box friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight, AdjustRobotControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance DynamicFrictionModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic friction model exchange"
    DTDFVocab:provides DynamicFrictionModelExchangeAction
]

instance DataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data traceability for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated data display for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameter identification used to adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceable data for model refinement decisions"
]

instance AdjustRobotControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DynamicFrictionModelExchangeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic exchange of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PhysicalSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical first axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    base:contains SysMLBDD, SysMLIBD, SimulinkCoulombViscousModel, SimulinkStribeckModel, SimulinkDahlModel, SimulinkLuGreModel, AssetAdministrationShell, MotorCurrentData, MotorPositionData, GearboxPositionData, GearboxAngularVelocityData, GearboxOutputTorqueData, SimulinkCoulombViscousSimulationData, SimulinkStribeckSimulationData, SimulinkDahlSimulationData, SimulinkLuGreSimulationData, VisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService, DynamicFrictionModelExchangeService, DataTraceabilityService, VisualizationInsight, FrictionParameterIdentificationInsight, DataTraceabilityInsight, AdjustRobotControlAlgorithmsAction, DynamicFrictionModelExchangeAction
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time continuous data streaming and processing with live measurements during robot operation for immediate friction model refinement."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, AAS metadata, MQTT-sourced sensor data traces, and processing components for friction model identification and dashboard visualization, with one-way data flow from physical system."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), continuously monitoring wear, tool changes, and application variations during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated data (from friction models) and measured sensor data for friction parameter accuracy, with multi-physics-aware identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot axis to digital shadow components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling language for digital shadow implementation."
]
